name: node-iferr
title: node-iferr
summary: Higher-order functions for easier error handling
description:
Higher-order functions for easier error handling
This library allows one to delegate to a function in case of error,
thus easing the error handling of the Node.js application.
.
This library is a dependency of npm, Node.js package manager.
.
Node.js is an event-based server-side JavaScript engine.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-iferr because Higher-order functions for easier error handling.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-iferr as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-iferr with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-iferr --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
